questionHtml:
An object of mass 2.0 kg is on a horizontal surface. The object is pulled by a force of 12.0 N and accelerates at 2.0 m s−2.

What is the coefficient of dynamic friction between the object and the surface?


A.  0.3

B.  0.4

C.  0.6

D.  0.8
